schema_violation.explanation: Original write attempt omitted the 'owner' field, required by schemas/mission.schema.json since ADR-030. Per GOVERNANCE.md §2, a write failing schema validation must never enter messages/queued/ — it is routed here instead.

request.title: ADR-030 Schema Gate test — deliberately invalid Mission
request.description: This Mission was intentionally constructed without the required 'owner' field to exercise the SCHEMA_INVALID dead-letter path end-to-end. It was never written to messages/queued/ — it exists only here, in dead-letter/, from the moment of creation.
request.expected_output: Confirms the dead-letter/SCHEMA_INVALID mechanism (ADR-030 §3.4) is followable in practice, not just documented.

history.detail: Checked draft against schemas/mission.schema.json before writing to queued/. Missing required field: owner. Routed directly to dead-letter/.
